def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    atr_period = params['atr_period']
    rsi_period = params['rsi_period']
    breakout_multiplier = params['breakout_multiplier']
    
    df['atr'] = ta.volatility.average_true_range(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_period)
    df['rsi'] = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=rsi_period)
    
    df['upper_band'] = df['close'].shift(1) + (breakout_multiplier * df['atr'].shift(1))
    df['lower_band'] = df['close'].shift(1) - (breakout_multiplier * df['atr'].shift(1))
    
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    signals[(df['high'] > df['upper_band']) & (df['rsi'] > 50)] = 1
    signals[(df['low'] < df['lower_band']) & (df['rsi'] < 50)] = -1
    
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: XAU/USD exhibits volatility breakout behavior when price exceeds ATR-based bands, confirmed by RSI momentum direction.
